description: Local Ollama smallest-two Gemma 4 comparison: e4b vs 12b on maintenance_value sparse and contract-visible lanes.

models.notes: Smallest configured Gemma 4 model. Proven docs_cli_sync smoke in 62.8s.

Second-smallest configured Gemma 4 model. On 2026-06-20, Ollama 0.30.10 installed and pulled the model; first sparse docs_cli_sync smoke produced no patch, so keep the full matrix gated until the no-edit behavior is classified or a rerun passes smoke.
